---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, module, or enhancement for CuriousBees V2
title: 'feat(scope): [brief description of enhancement]'
labels: enhancement, planning
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature or enhancement is.

## Problem Statement / Use Case

Describe the problem this feature solves, or why it would be beneficial to scholars, supervisors, or administrators.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see, including any user flows, components, or API endpoints.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or design assets here.
